testcase.name: register_duplicateEmail_returnsBadRequest
testcase.system-out:
23:39:52.922 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.tradingplatform.controller.AuthControllerTest]: AuthControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 23:39:53.160 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.tradingplatform.TradingPlatformApplication for test class com.tradingplatform.controller.AuthControllerTest

UserDetailsService beans will not be used by Spring Security for automatically configuring username/password login. Consider removing the AuthenticationProvider bean. Alternatively, consider using the UserDetailsService in a manually instantiated DaoAuthenticationProvider. If the current configuration is intentional, to turn off this warning, increase the logging level of 'org.springframework.security.config.annotation.authentication.configuration.InitializeUserDetailsBeanManagerConfigurer' to ERROR 2026-03-21T23:40:01.561+08:00 INFO 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.t.avatar.AvatarStorageService : Avatar upload directory initialized: D:\Java\Projects\realTimeTrading\backend\.\uploads\avatars 2026-03-21T23:40:01.669+08:00 INFO 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-03-21T23:40:03.132+08:00 INFO 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.t.l.service.ListingStorageService : Listing upload directory initialized: D:\Java\Projects\realTimeTrading\backend\.\uploads\listings 2026-03-21T23:40:06.633+08:00 DEBUG 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.t.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter : Filter 'jwtAuthenticationFilter' configured for use 2026-03-21T23:40:06.633+08:00 INFO 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-03-21T23:40:06.633+08:00 INFO 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-03-21T23:40:06.633+08:00 INFO 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 0 ms 2026-03-21T23:40:06.698+08:00 INFO 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.t.controller.AuthControllerTest : Started AuthControllerTest in 13.303 seconds (process running for 15.241) 2026-03-21T23:40:08.811+08:00 WARN 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.t.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : API exception: REGISTRATION_FAILED - Email already registered
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build what is described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (D:\Jeecg_Boot\Maven\respository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.15.11\byte-buddy-agent-1.15.11.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: login_nonExistentUser_returnsUnauthorized
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-21T23:40:09.151+08:00 WARN 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.tradingplatform.auth.AuthController : Authentication failed for email: nonexistent@example.com 2026-03-21T23:40:09.151+08:00 WARN 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.t.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : API exception: INVALID_CREDENTIALS - Invalid email or password

testcase.name: register_shortPassword_returnsBadRequest
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-21T23:40:09.172+08:00 WARN 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.t.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Validation failed: {password=Password must be at least 8 characters}

testcase.name: refresh_invalidToken_returnsUnauthorized
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-21T23:40:09.234+08:00 DEBUG 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.t.security.JwtTokenProvider : Invalid JWT token: Malformed protected header JSON: Unable to deserialize: Unexpected character ('�' (code 65533 / 0xfffd)): expected a valid value (JSON String, Number, Array, Object or token 'null', 'true' or 'false') at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 1, column: 1] 2026-03-21T23:40:09.234+08:00 WARN 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.t.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : API exception: TOKEN_INVALID - Invalid or expired refresh token

testcase.name: login_invalidPassword_returnsUnauthorized
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-21T23:40:09.838+08:00 WARN 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.tradingplatform.auth.AuthController : Authentication failed for email: wrongpass@example.com 2026-03-21T23:40:09.838+08:00 WARN 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.t.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : API exception: INVALID_CREDENTIALS - Invalid email or password

testcase.name: logout_invalidatesRefreshToken
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-21T23:40:09.966+08:00 INFO 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.tradingplatform.auth.AuthController : User 5 logged out 2026-03-21T23:40:09.968+08:00 WARN 16536 --- [trading-platform-test] [ main] c.t.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : API exception: TOKEN_INVALID - Refresh token has been revoked
